name: Change of Direction
preceding_figure_names: Double Reverse Spin, Heel Pivot (Quarter Turn To Left), Reverse Pivot
following_figure_names: Chasse Reverse Turn, Progressive Chasse To Right (step 4 of Change of Direction would not be taken in CBMP when followed by Progressive Chasse To Right), Cross Chasse (at corner)
notes: If you don't pull left hip back, it's easy for the step to become back weighted.

steps.action: fwd | FDW | H | starts to turn L | Sway(S) | CBM
back | BDW | TH | starts to turn L | Sway(S) | CBM
comments: After stepping, pull left hip back, leave L knee fwd, to allow using the standing leg to draw R leg.
